title_cn: 大观点：私人信贷满足“先买后付”（播客）
summary: Two opaque corners of finance have joined forces: shadow banking and phantom debt. Put another way, private credit firms are backing Buy-Now-Pay-Later companies to finance their expansion into the US consumer market. On today’s Big Take podcast, guest host Stacey Vanek Smith joins Bloomberg reporters J.J. McCorvey and René Ismail to discuss what private credit’s involvement in BNPL means for everyday borrowers, why it’s raising concerns and whether the risks hiding in these spaces could spill ov

The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Adnoc to Buy Shell's South African Fuel Stations

summary: Adnoc Distribution is has agreed to buy Shell fuel stations across South Africa in a deal valued at $1 billion. CEO Bader Saeed Al Lamki explained the rationale behind the move to Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 德国汽车行业增长超预期
summary: German industrial production grew for a second month, another sign that Europe’s largest economy is exiting the drag from the Iran war.

summary: Oil gained following attacks on shipping in and around the Strait of Hormuz, highlighting continued risks to vessels in the critical waterway.

title_cn: 壳牌推动上涨，富时 100 指数跑赢大盘

Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi is in Jakarta, where he and Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto are set to sign up to eight agreements spanning defense, health, education and technology.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Can Australia Become Asia-Pacific's AI Hub?
title_cn: 澳大利亚能否成为亚太人工智能中心？
summary: Australia is emerging as a leading destination for AI data centers, but the window to secure that advantage may be closing. Deloitte Access Economics says the country faces a "sliding doors moment" to become Asia-Pacific's AI infrastructure hub. John O'Mahony discusses what's at stake on 'Bloomberg: The Asia Trade.' (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: Won 的 24 小时交易首次亮相，交易量低于平均水平
summary: Trading in the Korean won passed with below-average volume in its first day of round-the-clock dealing during a largely uneventful session, compared to the past 30 days.

title: Samsung’s Record Profit Fails to Impress After AI Chip Rally
title_cn: AI芯片上涨后，三星创纪录的利润未能给人留下深刻印象
summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s quarterly profit surged 19-fold but failed to impress investors used to eye-catching growth numbers from the suppliers of chips to the global AI boom.

title: Early Forint Bull Barclays Sees Rally Fading as Euro Work Begins
title_cn: 随着欧元工作的开始，巴克莱早期的福林牛市认为涨势正在消退
summary: The forint rally triggered by Hungary’s political shift is fading as Prime Minister Peter Magyar faces a daunting task to prepare the country for euro accession, according to a strategist at Barclays Plc.

title: Buy SK Hynix’s New ADRs and Sell Seoul-Listed Shares, UBS Says
title_cn: 瑞银表示，购买 SK 海力士的新 ADR 并出售首尔上市股票
summary: Investors should purchase SK Hynix Inc.’s planned American depositary receipts and sell the chipmaker’s South Korean-traded stock as the new securities are likely to trade at a premium, according to UBS Group AG.

title: China Buys More US Soybeans as Key Agricultural Trade Ramps Up
title_cn: 随着主要农产品贸易的增加，中国购买更多美国大豆
summary: China has purchased more soybeans from the US, according to people familiar with the matter, as the key agricultural trade gains momentum following a summit between the leaders of the two nations in May.

title: Hong Kong Begins Trial Operation of New Gold Clearing System
title_cn: 香港新黄金结算系统开始试运行
summary: Hong Kong has launched the trial operation of a new gold clearing system, backed by several major banks, in a key step toward its ambition to become a significant bullion-trading hub with price-setting power.

title: US Talks Tested as LNG Ship Struck in Hormuz Strait
title_cn: 液化天然气船在霍尔木兹海峡触礁，美国谈判经受考验
summary: A laden liquefied natural gas carrier was hit by a projectile near the Omani coast as it exited the Strait of Hormuz, heightening unease among shipowners and testing a US-Iran agreement intended to halt attacks in the waterway. Bloomberg's Stuart Livingstone-Wallace breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nuveen's Cooper Sees Rotation Back Into Hyperscalers (Video)

title_cn: BAE 支持的风险投资公司 Expeditions 为欧洲国防初创公司筹集 1.97 亿欧元资金
summary: A defense-tech venture capital firm backed by BAE Systems and the NATO Innovation Fund has raised a €197 million ($225 million) fund to help develop sovereign military technologies in Europe.

title: SpaceX Analysts Nearly All Say Buy, Touting Gains Up to 87%
title_cn: SpaceX 分析师几乎全都表示买入，称其涨幅高达 87%
summary: SpaceX is winning early backing from Wall Street as global brokerages start coverage of Elon Musk’s rocket and artificial intelligence company with a clear consensus: buy the stock.

title: Asia Stocks Drop on Chip Selloff, Nasdaq Futures Down
title_cn: 亚洲股市因芯片抛售而下跌，纳斯达克期货下跌
summary: Asian equities fell as renewed selling in technology stocks, including Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc., deepened concerns that the AI-driven rally may have run ahead of itself. Futures for the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 Index retreated 1.1%, suggesting Monday’s rebound on Wall Street was losing momentum. European shares were also set for losses. Bloomberg's Avril Hong and Mark Cranfield report. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Won’t Bring Back Era of Rapid Growth, Says Nobel Prize Winner
title_cn: 诺贝尔奖获得者表示，人工智能不会带回快速增长的时代
summary: A Nobel Prize-winning economist has warned that artificial intelligence will not return Western economies to the era of rapid productivity growth, which may be gone forever.

title: Why Samsung’s Record Profit Failed to Impress Investors
title_cn: 为什么三星创纪录的利润未能打动投资者
summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s quarterly profit surged 19-fold but failed to impress investors used to eye-catching growth from the suppliers of AI chips. Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin speaks with Constellation Research's Day Wang to understand what investors are thinking. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe’s Defense Stocks Rally Has Much Riding on NATO Summit
title_cn: 欧洲国防股上涨很大程度上得益于北约峰会
summary: A fledgling rebound in European defense stocks faces a test this week, as investors look to a NATO summit for further clarity on member states’ defense spending plans.

title: Self-Driving Startup Turing Gets AMD Backing and GPUs
title_cn: 自动驾驶初创公司 Turing 获得 AMD 支持和 GPU
summary: Self-driving tech developer Turing Inc. has added AMD Ventures to its list of backers and begun adopting Advanced Micro Devices Inc.’s AI accelerators in its systems.

title: Tencent Sells $1.5 Billion Kuaishou Stake as AI Pivot Quickens
title_cn: 随着 AI 转型加速，腾讯出售 15 亿美元快手股份
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. sold $1.5 billion of stock in Chinese TikTok rival Kuaishou Technology, paring mature internet bets during a pivot to artificial intelligence.

title: Chinese Firms Leave Nvidia for Local AI Suppliers, Survey Shows
title_cn: 调查显示，中国企业纷纷放弃英伟达，转向本土人工智能供应商
summary: Chinese companies are ditching Nvidia Corp.’s advanced accelerators in favor of domestic silicon, underscoring how tensions with the US are reshaping the AI infrastructure buildout and propelling Beijing’s ambitions to substitute American technology.

title: WiseTech Shares Jump After Billionaire White Quits as Chair
title_cn: 亿万富翁怀特辞去董事长职务后慧咨科技股价大涨
summary: Billionaire Richard White has stepped down as chair of WiseTech Global Ltd., just weeks after denying he was involved in human trafficking amid reports he was being investigated by police over claims he used a woman’s immigration status for sex.

title: Nvidia Supplier Unimicron Raises $1.4 Billion in GDS Sale
title_cn: Nvidia 供应商欣兴电子通过 GDS 出售筹集 14 亿美元资金
summary: Unimicron Technology Corp. raised $1.36 billion from a sale of global depositary shares, capitalizing on an artificial-intelligence frenzy that has lifted the Taiwanese chip supplier’s stock more than 700% over the past 12 months.

title: Samsung’s Soaring Profit Fails to Lift Shares
title_cn: 三星利润飙升未能提振股价
summary: Samsung's results are in the spotlight as investors try to gauge how long sky-high investments and valuations around AI will last. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Universal’s Latest ‘Minions’ Posts $62 Million in Debut
title_cn: 环球影业最新电影《小黄人》首映票房收入达 6200 万美元
summary: Minions & Monsters was the No. 1 movie in US and Canadian theaters over the long July 4 holiday weekend with ticket sales of $62 million, a number that still fell short of earlier entries in the seven-film franchise.

title: Chip Stocks Rally in AI Trade Revival | The Close 7/6/2026
title_cn: 芯片股因人工智能贸易复苏而上涨 |收盘价 7/6/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Morgan Stanley PWM Executive Director Katerina Simonetti, BlackRock Deputy CIO of Global Fixed Income Russ Brownback, Jefferies Equity Research Analyst David Chiaverini, Hamilton Lane Co-CEO Erik Hirsch, Wells Fargo Investment Institute Head of Global Investment Strategy Paul Christopher, Bokeh Capital Partners Founder & Chief Investment Officer Kim Forrest, US Chief Design Officer Joe Gebbia, Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev, & Churchill Asset Management Vice Chairman & Chief Investment Strategist Randy Schwimmer. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Private Credit is Fueling the Buy-Now-Pay-Later Boom
title_cn: 私人信贷如何推动“先买后付”热潮
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast, we track how private credit is funding the Buy-Now-Pay-Later boom, what it means for borrowers and why the relationship is raising red flags. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk-Altman Judge Sends OpenAI Battle to Mediator
title_cn: 马斯克-奥特曼法官将 OpenAI 之战发送给调解员
summary: The judge overseeing the legal battle between Elon Musk and Sam Altman and their dueling AI startups enlisted a mediator to resolve the dispute.

title: Business Development Companies Face Pressure but Not All Are Impacted Equally
title_cn: 业务发展公司面临压力，但并非所有公司都受到同样的影响
summary: Shares of business development companies (BDCs) have experienced significant pressure in the first half of the year, with Bloomberg Intelligence data showing a median return decline of about 7%, marking the weakest performance since 2022. Randy Schummer, Vice Chair and Chief Investment Strategist at Churchill Asset Management, addressed these concerns on the program, emphasizing that not all BDCs should be viewed the same way. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Stocks Extend Rally Ahead of Samsung Earnings, SK Hynix IPO
title_cn: 科技股在三星财报和 SK 海力士 IPO 之前延续涨势
summary: US stocks climbed on Monday as investors jumped on technology shares after the blistering artificial-intelligence trade wavered heading into the holiday weekend.

title: Morgan Stanley Adviser Discusses Sustainability of Earnings Growth Amid Market Rally
title_cn: 摩根士丹利顾问讨论市场反弹期间盈利增长的可持续性
summary: Katerina Simonetti, Executive Director at Morgan Stanley Private Wealth Management, discusses the ongoing market rally, emphasizing that it is supported not just by multiple expansion but also by relatively healthy earnings. She highlighted the key question facing investors: whether earnings growth can continue into the second half of the year and if this growth will be uniform across sectors or show signs of divergence. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Drone Maker Ondas Says the 'Arms Race' Has Started
title_cn: 无人机制造商昂达斯称“军备竞赛”已经开始
summary: Ondas, which develops drones and secures wireless communications, has agreed to buy autonomous aircraft maker DZYNE Technologies in a cash-and-stock deal worth over $875 million, which will turn Ondas into a full-service autonomous defense technology platform. Ondas Chairman and CEO Eric Brock joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple, Broadcom Expand Custom Chip Partnership | Bloomberg Tech 7/06/2026
title_cn: 苹果与博通扩大定制芯片合作伙伴关系彭博科技 7/06/2026
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down Apple's big bet on Broadcom for the future, extending its custom chip partnership through 2031. Plus, Microsoft eyes a massive reorganization of its Xbox unit with plans to eliminate 20% of its staff over the next year, and SK Hynix begins marketing its US listing with plans to sell roughly $28 billion in American depositary receipts. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Runway Expands Global AI Footprint
title_cn: Runway 扩大全球人工智能足迹
summary: Runway is going global, with the AI video company opening new hubs in London, Tokyo, and Paris, and plans to invest nearly $300 million over the next few years as it scales its business and AI research. Runway co-founder and CEO Cristóbal Valenzuela joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple, Broadcom Extend Chip Deal to 2031
title_cn: 苹果与博通将芯片交易延长至 2031 年
summary: Broadcom will provide new custom chips to Apple in an expanded partnership that now runs through 2031. The companies will partner on ASIC silicon, which will be found in “multiple generations of Apple products,” according to a Broadcom filing. Bloomberg's Consumer Tech and Apple Managing Editor Mark Gurman joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: RBC's Janet Mui Sees Semiconductor Stock Pullback as Healthy Consolidation
title_cn: 加拿大皇家银行 (RBC) 的珍妮特·梅 (Janet Mui) 将半导体股票回调视为健康整合
summary: Janet Mui, Head of Market Analysis at RBC Brewin Dolphin, discussed the recent pullback in semiconductor stocks, characterizing it as a healthy consolidation following a strong rally rather than the beginning of a broad market reversal. She emphasized that the fundamental demand for semiconductors continues to far outstrip supply, supporting ongoing investor interest. Despite occasional market jitters triggered by news events, such as developments in the cloud computing sector, Mui highlighted that the underlying fundamentals remain robust. This strength has led to a rebound in chip stocks after the recent US holiday, with investors taking advantage of price dips during consolidation phases. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft’s Xbox to Cut 3,200 Jobs, Divest Studios in Overhaul
title_cn: 微软 Xbox 将裁员 3,200 人并剥离工作室进行全面改革
summary:
Microsoft Corp.’s Xbox plans to eliminate 3,200 jobs, or around 20% of its staff over the next year, as part of a massive reorganization to spur growth in the struggling gaming division. Xbox will also divest four of its video-game development studios and is beginning the process to part ways with a fifth.
“Our business today is not healthy,” Chief Executive Officer Asha Sharma wrote in a note to staff Monday morning, adding that Xbox is operating at margins three to 10 times lower than comparable businesses. “We must reset Xbox.”
Brody Ford, Bloomberg Technology Reporter, joined Bloomberg's Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu to talk about Microsoft's XBox layoffs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ondas to Buy Military Drone Maker DZYNE for $875.8 Million
title_cn: Ondas 以 8.758 亿美元收购军用无人机制造商 DZYNE
summary: Ondas Inc. agreed to buy autonomous aircraft maker DZYNE Technologies in an $875.8 million cash-and stock-deal that positions Ondas as a full-service autonomous defense technology platform.

title: South Africa Treasury Cuts Johannesburg Funds Over Wage Bill
title_cn: 南非财政部削减约翰内斯堡工资法案资金
summary: South Africa’s National Treasury will withhold state funding for Johannesburg and dozens of other municipalities this month over their failure to manage their finances properly.

title: Samsung Slumps After Earnings; Tanker Hit in Hormuz Before NATO Summit | Daybreak Europe 7/7/2026
title_cn: 三星财报公布后股价暴跌；北约峰会前油轮在霍尔木兹被击中欧洲黎明 7/7/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, trading on South Korea's Kospi was halted briefly after a sharp fall. Samsung led the decline, dropping as much a 10% despite a 19-fold surge in quarterly profit. Futures point to a lower open in Europe and the US.

Oil edged higher after a tanker transiting the Strait of Hormuz reported being hit. Bloomberg understands it was an LNG carrier owned by Qatar's state-owned shipping company. Separately, Axios reported Iran fired at least two missiles at commercial ships transiting the strait.

Today's guest: Anna Macdonald, Hargreaves Lansdown, Investment Strategy Director. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mexico Military Might Fails to Curb Fentanyl Trade, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称墨西哥军方未能遏制芬太尼贸易
summary: Mexico’s military deployment to the state at the heart of the country’s drug trade has failed to curb fentanyl exports and bring down the homicide rate among young people, according to a report.

title: Forced-Labor Hearing Begins, Paving Way for More Trump Tariffs
title_cn: 强迫劳动听证会开始，为特朗普征收更多关税铺平道路
summary: A three-day hearing on the US Trade Representative’s latest plan to impose tariffs on major trading partners kicks off in Washington on Tuesday.

title: Court to Decide Whether Le Pen Can Run for President
title_cn: 法院将决定勒庞是否可以竞选总统
summary: A French court is set to decide today on whether Marine Le Pen will be able to run in next year's presidential election. The 57-year-old was sentenced in March to a five-year election ban and a two-year jail term that’s on hold while she appeals. She was accused of misusing about €474,000 ($540,000) between 2009 and 2016, when she was a member of the European Parliament. Douglas Yates from the American Graduate School in Paris speaks to Bloomberg's Caroline Connan about the upcoming verdict. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India, Indonesia Sign BrahMos, Missile Pacts During Modi Visit
title_cn: 莫迪访问期间印度和印度尼西亚签署布拉莫斯导弹条约
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto unveiled a series of agreements on Tuesday, including a contract for BrahMos supersonic cruise missile systems and an air-to-air missile cooperation pact, marking a significant expansion of defense ties.

title: Modi and Prabowo Seek to Strengthen India-Indonesia Ties
title_cn: 莫迪和普拉博沃寻求加强印度与印度尼西亚的关系
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto are set to sign defense and other deals on Tuesday to strengthen strategic ties. Bloomberg's Ruchi Bhatia reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK's Burnham Committed to Industrial Strategy, Minister Says
title_cn: 部长表示英国伯纳姆致力于产业战略
summary: UK Business Secretary Peter Kyle said the governing Labour Party’s industrial strategy will survive a change of leadership, arguing Keir Starmer’s likely successor, Andy Burnham, was “already committed” to the policy. Kyle made the comments Monday in an interview to Bloomberg's Lizzy Burden. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Duterte’s Fiery Missive as Day Two of Senate Trial Gets Underway
title_cn: 参议院审判第二天，杜特尔特发表激烈信函
summary: Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte made a surprise visit to the Senate on Tuesday, claiming in a dramatic burst she intends to stand firm despite attacks against her.

title: Qatari LNG Ship Struck in Strait of Hormuz, Testing US Talks
title_cn: 卡塔尔液化天然气船在霍尔木兹海峡触礁，考验美国谈判
summary: A laden liquefied natural gas carrier was hit by a projectile near the Omani coast as it exited the Strait of Hormuz, heightening unease among shipowners and testing a US-Iran agreement intended to halt attacks in the waterway.

title: What Is on the Agenda at the NATO Summit?
title_cn: 北约峰会的议程是什么？
summary: The NATO Summit starts today in the Turkish capital city of Ankara. Ahead of the gathering, NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte cautioned that allies don’t have an endless supply of missile interceptors. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook breaks down the situation and what to expect from the military alliance's meeting. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: It’s a Different, More Confident Zelenskyy Coming to NATO This Year
title_cn: 泽连斯基今年来到北约，是一个不同的、更加自信的人
summary: Volodymyr Zelenskyy is in good spirits ahead of talks with Donald Trump and other NATO leaders at their summit in Turkey, according to a person who spoke with him in recent days. The Ukrainian president has grounds for confidence.

title: Le Pen or Bardella? Court to Decide Who Can Run for President
title_cn: 勒庞还是巴尔德拉？法院决定谁可以竞选总统
summary: The outcome of Marine Le Pen’s appeal of her conviction for embezzling public funds could shape French and European politics for years.

title: The Chancellor Whisperer: Deutsche Bank’s New Clout in Berlin
title_cn: 德国总理低语者：德意志银行在柏林的新影响力
summary: After refocusing Deutsche Bank on its home market, CEO Christian Sewing has emerged as one of the most influential executives in Berlin.

title: Hanwha Ocean Plunges Over 20% After Losing Canada Sub Deal
title_cn: 失去加拿大分包交易后韩华海洋股价暴跌逾 20%
summary: Shares of Hanwha Ocean fell more than 23% on Tuesday morning after Canada picked a German bid to replace its aging submarine fleet over the South Korean shipbuilder’s proposal.

title: Iran Missiles Reportedly Hit Ships in Hormuz, Testing US Talks
title_cn: 据报道，伊朗导弹击中霍尔木兹的船只，考验美国谈判
summary: Iran fired at least two missiles at commercial ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz on Monday night, Axios reported, testing a late-June deal with the US to halt attacks as the two sides work toward a peace agreement.

title: Platner Urged to Drop Maine Senate Bid After Assault Allegations
title_cn: 袭击指控后普拉特纳敦促放弃缅因州参议院竞选
summary: Maine Democrat Graham Platner is under pressure from party leaders and allies to end his bid for a US Senate seat following a sexual assault allegation he has denied.

title: Singapore Opposition Parties PPP, PSP See Leadership Changes
title_cn: 新加坡反对党 PPP、PSP 领导层发生变动
summary: Two opposition political groups in Singapore announced leadership changes a year after a resounding election victory by the ruling party.

title: Mbappe Blasts Paraguay Senator for Racism After World Cup Duel
title_cn: 姆巴佩在世界杯决斗后抨击巴拉圭参议员种族主义
summary: Kylian Mbappe called out blatantly racist remarks by a Paraguayan politician, receiving support from French President Emmanuel Macron and prompting the South American government to go into damage control in the wake of the nation’s World Cup loss.

title: Xi Gives Trump an ‘Easy’ Win, Smoothing Path for Next Summit
title_cn: 习近平让特朗普“轻松”获胜，为下次峰会铺平道路
summary: President Xi Jinping’s agreement to free an imprisoned Christian pastor at President Donald Trump’s request showcased an improved state of US-China relations ahead of challenging negotiations looming in the run-up to their next summit in September.

title: Antilles Pitches US Buyer Plan for Sanctioned Cuba Gold Mine
title_cn: 安的列斯群岛向美国提出购买受制裁古巴金矿的计划
summary: Australian miner Antilles Gold Ltd. is offering to sell a controlling interest in its joint venture gold mine in Cuba to a US investor in a bid to have sanctions lifted, and says it is “encouraged” by the Trump administration’s response.

title: Trump Again Asks Supreme Court to Block $5 Million Carroll Award
title_cn: 特朗普再次要求最高法院阻止 500 万美元卡罗尔奖
summary: President Donald Trump filed a last-ditch plea with the US Supreme Court as he tries to prevent the writer E. Jean Carroll from collecting $5 million awarded by a jury that found he had sexually abused and defamed her.

title: Australia Slams China Test of Nuclear-Capable Missile in Pacific
title_cn: 澳大利亚猛烈抨击中国在太平洋试验核导弹
summary: Senior Australian officials criticized China’s decision to test-fire an intercontinental ballistic missile from a nuclear submarine in the Pacific Ocean, describing it as “destabilizing” and expressing concern to Beijing.

title: Trump’s Influence Extends to Even World Cup Decisions
title_cn: 特朗普的影响力甚至延伸到了世界杯的决定上
summary: It doesn’t help FIFA’s credibility that the organization won’t explain its reversal.

title: House Dems Investigate Trump's Running of Freedom 250 | Balance of Power: Late Edition 07/06/2026
title_cn: 众议院民主党调查特朗普的自由竞选 250 |权力平衡：最新版 07/06/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Leon Panetta, former US Secretary of defense and CIA director, says the U.S. and NATO should provide Ukraine with the missiles it needs to keep pressure on Russia, arguing Vladimir Putin "only understands force." Jessica Taylor, Senate and Governors Editor for the Cook Political Report, says it "absolutely" would be best for Graham Platner to withdraw from Maine's Senate race after allegations of nonconsensual sexual behavior that he denies. Democratic Congressman Jared Huffman of California, the ranking member of the House Natural Resources Committee, discusses a report released by Democrats on the committee alleging possible fraud. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Huffman Alleges Freedom 250 Crossed Into Fraud
title_cn: 众议员霍夫曼指控 Freedom 250 涉嫌欺诈
summary: Democratic Congressman Jared Huffman of California, the ranking member of the House Natural Resources Committee, discusses a report released by Democrats on the committee alleging possible fraud, diverted donations and improper use of public resources involving the Trump-backed Freedom 250 organization and the nation's 250th anniversary celebration. Freedom 250 has denied the allegations. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Peru’s Central Bank Chief Agrees to Extend 20-Year Run
title_cn: 秘鲁央行行长同意延长20年期限
summary: Peru’s central bank chief Julio Velarde, seen as a pillar of economic stability in the politically volatile Andean nation, has agreed to stay on for another term, likely extending one of the world’s longest tenures at the helm of a monetary authority.

title: UK Urged to Reverse Freeze on Student Loan Repayment Threshold
title_cn: 英国敦促取消学生贷款偿还门槛的冻结
summary: The UK government should reverse a decision to freeze the earnings level at which graduates begin repaying their student loans, an influential panel of lawmakers said.

title: Panetta Says NATO Must Arm Ukraine To Pressure Putin
title_cn: 帕内塔称北约必须武装乌克兰向普京施压
summary: Leon Panetta, former US Secretary of defense and CIA director, says the U.S. and NATO should provide Ukraine with the missiles it needs to keep pressure on Russia, arguing Vladimir Putin "only understands force." He also says a strong US relationship with Turkey is "very important" to Washington's ability to have "more sway in what happens in the Middle East." He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)
